author: Artem Buldin
name: SP8192 + QK Depth Ramp + Parallel Residuals from Layer 6 + Legal TTT
blurb: Single-seed systems rerun of our SP8192 qkramp05/par0 recipe on PyTorch 2.9.1+cu128 + flash_attn_3. Same model recipe as the earlier stabilized run, but the corrected runtime stack recovered 4661 steps in 588s and reached 1.08088517 bpb with legal score-first TTT.
technique_summary: SP8192 + depth recurrence + QK depth ramp (5.0->5.5) + parallel residuals from layer 6 + legal score-first TTT + GPTQ SDClip + Brotli

notes.environment: Rerun on a fresh PyTorch 2.9.1+cu128 image with flash_attn_3. The train_gpt.py snapshot is the same stabilized recipe used on the older container.

our_contribution: Kept the qkramp05/par0 modeling recipe fixed and reran it on the intended modern runtime stack, recovering throughput and the expected score from the same train_gpt.py snapshot.
